name: gsd-windsurf
description: Get Shit Done (GSD) — A spec-driven development workflow system for Windsurf with structured planning, execution, and goal-backward verification.
author: Adapted from github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done by TACHES

commands./gsd-help: Show all available GSD commands and usage guide
commands./gsd-new-project: Initialize a new project with questioning, requirements, and roadmap
commands./gsd-plan: Create executable phase plans with task breakdown and dependency analysis
commands./gsd-execute: Execute a phase plan (PLAN.md) with task-by-task implementation
commands./gsd-verify: Verify a phase achieved its goal through goal-backward analysis
commands./gsd-progress: Check project progress and get routed to the next action
commands./gsd-quick: Execute a quick ad-hoc task with GSD quality guarantees
commands./gsd-debug: Debug issues using the GSD scientific method with hypothesis testing

setup_instructions: Copy all files from .windsurf/workflows/ into your project's .windsurf/workflows/ directory. No build step or dependencies required. Use /gsd-help in Windsurf chat to get started.
